metadata.title: Produce a compliance_evidence_prompt for a legal workflow in the United Kingdom, using the sovereign_lens, while handling contradictory_constraints input.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a compliance_evidence_prompt for a legal workflow in the United Kingdom, using the sovereign_lens, while handling contradictory_constraints input.
mission.success_definition: A valid compliance_evidence_prompt that passes sovereign_lens validation, resolves contradictions, and includes a repair receipt.

in_scope.item: Single compliance_evidence_prompt artifact for legal_workflow, depth D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE, runtime Codex.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: A valid compliance_evidence_prompt that passes sovereign_lens validation, resolves contradictions, and includes a repair receipt.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.evidence_goal: Produce a compliance_evidence_prompt for a legal workflow in the United Kingdom, using the sovereign_lens, while handling contradictory_constraints input.
SRXML_Artifact.source_policy: Use primary sources and label unsupported claims.

evidence_items.item: Single compliance_evidence_prompt artifact for legal_workflow, depth D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE, runtime Codex.

claim_limits.item: Input is intentionally messy with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria. Must block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Output must be SR8-compilable with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Contradictory constraints: raw_intent demands both a compliance_evidence_prompt for legal_workflow and a blocked_state_receipt with should_block true. Sovereign_lens requires unambiguous acceptance criteria and complete context, but input is intentionally contradictory, missing context, and ambiguous. Cannot compile a valid SR8 directive without resolving the contradiction between building a prompt and blocking with a receipt. Unsafe to proceed without clarification of whether the output is a prompt or a block receipt.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
